highlights.title: Reading memory foundation
highlights.description: Paragraphs, selections, threads, and annotations are remembered so assistants can reuse existing judgments later.

highlights.title: Traceable assistant tool flow
highlights.description: Assistant selection actions, thread replies, and co-reading loops now run through a diagnosable tool-call flow.

highlights.title: Annotation discussions and distillation
highlights.description: Annotations can open dedicated discussion windows where assistants help turn conclusions into publishable distilled cards.

highlights.title: Themes and reader paper
highlights.description: Added the theme picker and reader paper backgrounds for unified web, EPUB, and PDF reading visuals.

highlights.title: Library and import polish
highlights.description: Improved web article covers and progress, batch file import, card stats hints, and display metadata cleanup.

highlights.title: Reading regressions fixed
highlights.description: Fixed PDF annotation anchors, EPUB arrow-key paging, reading progress restore, and related issues.
